principle: Emit a self-referential canonical link on every page and point all duplicate variants to it — skipping self-canonicals lets scrapers and URL-parameter variants dilute your ranking signals
explanation: X.seo|canonical_tag: every_page -> <link rel=canonical href=self_absolute_URL>_in_<head>; duplicate_sources(tracking_params+pagination+print_version+http/https+www/non-www+trailing_slash) -> canonical_to_primary_URL; rules: ALWAYS_absolute_URL NOT relative; consistent_with_sitemap+internal_links+hreflang; ONE_canonical_per_page; NO:relative_href NO:missing_self_canonical_on_original(aggregators_outrank_you) NO:conflicting_canonical+noindex; eg: "/article?utm_source=tw" >> "<link rel=canonical href=https://site.com/article>"

principle: Publish a complete reciprocal hreflang cluster with x-default and a self-reference on every localized page — incomplete clusters cause Google to show the wrong language in SERPs
explanation: X.seo|hreflang_cluster: multilingual_page -> <link rel=alternate hreflang=XX href=URL>_for_EVERY_version + self_reference + x-default_fallback; format: lang_code(en) OR lang-region(en-us,pt-br); cluster_MUST_be_reciprocal(A->B requires B->A); placement: <head> OR sitemap_xhtml:link OR HTTP_Link_header; NO:unilateral_hreflang NO:missing_self_reference NO:missing_x-default NO:pointing_to_noindex_URLs NO:mismatched_casing; eg: "<link rel=alternate hreflang='en' href='/en'> only" >> "full_cluster: en+de+fr+x-default + self on each page"

principle: Publish identical NAP (Name, Address, Phone) byte-for-byte across footer, contact page, LocalBusiness schema, and every directory — inconsistent NAP is the #1 local-ranking killer
explanation: X.seo|local_nap_consistency: physical_business -> identical_NAP_everywhere(footer+contact+schema+Google_Business_Profile+Yelp+directories); format_exact(Street_vs_St., spaces, phone_mask); emit_LocalBusiness_JSON-LD: name+address(PostalAddress)+telephone+geo(lat+lng)+openingHoursSpecification; embed_map_on_contact_page; include_city+region_in_title+H1+meta_description; claim_Google_Business_Profile; NO:'Street'_in_footer_vs_'St.'_in_schema NO:phone_'(555)_123-4567'_vs_'555.123.4567' NO:missing_GBP; eg: "footer: 'Call us: 555-1234'" >> "NAP_block_consistent + LocalBusiness_schema + GBP_claimed + city_in_H1"
